title: rungia anamalayana
intro: Rungia anamalayana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Anamalai Rungia or Nilgiri Rungia. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In traditional medicine, the leaves of Rungia anamalayana are often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and are also used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
